summary.en: Chile BESS fire safety is usually handled through the project approval, electrical installation, owner engineering, insurer, municipal, environmental, and emergency-response route rather than a single BESS fire certificate. SEC installation rules, declared electrical installations, site permits, and project fire-risk studies may require evidence on thermal runaway, spacing, ventilation, detection, suppression, emergency shutdown, access, and Spanish emergency procedures.
summary.zh: 智利BESS消防安全通常通过项目批准、电气安装、业主工程、保险、市政、环境及应急响应路径处理，而不是通过单一BESS消防证书处理。SEC安装规则、申报电气安装、现场许可及项目火灾风险研究可能要求提供热失控、间距、通风、探测、灭火、紧急停机、通道和西班牙语应急程序证据。
summary.zht: 智利BESS消防安全通常通過項目批准、電氣安裝、業主工程、保險、市政、環境及應急響應路徑處理，而不是通過單一BESS消防證書處理。SEC安裝規則、申報電氣安裝、現場許可及項目火災風險研究可能要求提供熱失控、間距、通風、探測、滅火、緊急停機、通道和西班牙語應急程序證據。

standards_or_laws: SEC Reglamento de Seguridad de las Instalaciones de Consumo de Energia Electrica - Decreto 08

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, container fire design, factory fire-suppression tests, and local Chinese project fire review. These documents may support Chilean due diligence but do not replace Chilean site permits, electrical declarations, insurer review, or emergency-response acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023、集装箱消防设计、工厂消防测试和中国当地项目消防审查。这些文件可支持智利尽调，但不能替代智利现场许可、电气申报、保险方审查或应急响应验收。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023、集裝箱消防設計、工廠消防測試和中國當地項目消防審查。這些文件可支持智利盡調，但不能替代智利現場許可、電氣申報、保險方審查或應急響應驗收。

gap.en: Exporters should localize the fire-safety package for Chile: installation drawings, rack spacing, ventilation or gas management, detection and suppression logic, deflagration or exhaust assumptions where relevant, shutdown interfaces, firefighter access, water runoff controls, SDS, incident response, and Spanish operating and emergency manuals.
gap.zh: 出口商应为智利本地化消防安全资料包：安装图、电池架间距、通风或气体管理、探测和灭火逻辑、适用时的泄爆或排气假设、停机接口、消防通道、消防废水控制、SDS、事故响应以及西班牙语运行和应急手册。
gap.zht: 出口商應為智利本地化消防安全資料包：安裝圖、電池架間距、通風或氣體管理、探測和滅火邏輯、適用時的洩爆或排氣假設、停機接口、消防通道、消防廢水控制、SDS、事故響應以及西班牙語運行和應急手冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Chilean electrical installation, permit, environmental, municipal, insurer, or emergency-response review applies; no universal Chile whole-BESS fire certificate is assumed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation location, and local fire review

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Fire safety for Chile BESS is a site and project approval issue. Chinese GB reports help, but Chile-specific installation drawings, emergency procedures, and reviewer-ready fire-risk evidence are still needed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智利BESS消防安全属于现场和项目批准问题。中国GB报告有帮助，但仍需要面向智利的安装图、应急程序和可供审查的火灾风险证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智利BESS消防安全屬於現場和項目批准問題。中國GB報告有幫助，但仍需要面向智利的安裝圖、應急程序和可供審查的火災風險證據。
